title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama CLI and server that lets you pull, run, and manage large language models locally with a single command.

title: ollama-python
summary: First-party Python client for the Ollama API, installable from PyPI as `ollama`.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers, published on npm as `ollama`.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration that wraps Ollama models as LangChain LLMs and embeddings.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Open-source ChatGPT-style web interface for Ollama, packaged as a lightweight Docker container.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client SDK for Ollama, available on Maven Central.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for interacting with the Ollama API.

title: ollama-cli (npm)
summary: Community-built interactive CLI that wraps the Ollama REST API with prompts and history.

title: ollama-copilots
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot-style inline suggestions.

title: ollama-hass-addon
summary: Home Assistant add-on that runs Ollama server inside Hass.io for local voice/text automations.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes clusters.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Official example Discord bot that answers questions using any Ollama model.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix derivation that builds Ollama from source with CUDA and ROCm variants.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up an Ollama service for CI pipelines needing local LLM calls.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Lightweight Slack bot server written in Go that forwards channel mentions to Ollama.

title: ollama-cpp (PyPI)
summary: Unofficial Python bindings that expose Ollama’s C++ core directly for faster inference.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit chat app template that connects to local Ollama and supports file uploads.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing async/await wrappers over the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds a local AI assistant sidebar powered by any Ollama model.

title: ollama-reddit
summary: Active subreddit for announcements, troubleshooting, and showcase of Ollama projects.
